title: urmon
text: urmon Executable file for the Uniface Router Monitor. urmon Description Located in the /bin subdirectory Related Links urmon.asn Assignment file for the Uniface Router Monitor. You can use the urmon.asn file to specify settings that relate to the Uniface Router Monitor. Uniface Router Monitor The Uniface Router Monitor is a Uniface Windows application that you can use to fine-tune the performance of the Uniface Router while it is running. Monitoring the Uniface Router The activities that you can perform with the Uniface Router Monitor depend on whether or not you are a privileged user. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
